active.name: Offense (Fire)
active.effect: Combusts atoms into superheated plasma, vaporizing enemies or melting through steel bulkheads with concentrated thermal lances

active.name: Defense
active.effect: Grounds self against energy, absorbing heat or shock, or transmutes skin into steel or stone to ignore physical trauma

active.name: Utility
active.effect: Fuses broken items back together, transmutes base materials (turning mud to stone), or reshapes raw matter into weapons and tools
